name: E-commerce Inventory COGS & Inter-provincial Employment
description: Complete Chloe Tremblay's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Chloe is a resident of New Brunswick (NB) as of Dec 31, 2024. Her T4 from Tech Innovations Inc. includes Employment Income (Box 14) of $68,450, Income Tax Deducted (Box 22) of $10,250, and Province of Employment (Box 10) as ON (Ontario). For her e-commerce sole proprietorship 'Chloe's Custom Crafts', complete form T2125 with Gross Sales of $45,750, Opening Inventory of $5,240, Purchases of $12,860, and Closing Inventory of $4,110. Include general business expenses for Freight/Delivery ($4,820), Management/Admin fees ($2,150), and Advertising ($3,550). For Business-Use-of-Home, include Rent ($18,000) and Utilities ($1,200) based on 150 sq ft of a 1,000 sq ft home. Claim Medical Expenses of $4,600 for laser eye surgery. Save the completed return as 'chloe_tremblay.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 Chapter 3 (Inventory and COGS), CRA Form T2203 (Multiple Jurisdictions)
metadata.occupation: Remote tech worker and e-commerce seller
metadata.key_complexity: T2125 Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) structured entry; Inter-provincial employment flag (Box 10 ON vs Residence NB); Business-use-of-home square footage proration
